title: Right now is enough
subtitle: An affirmation for anchoring the mind to the present moment when it wants to reach forward or back.
excerpt: A short affirmation for Day 8 of the SLEEP program. A single statement that returns the mind to this moment: not tomorrow, not this morning. It names the present as sufficient.
sourceNotes: Original to homemade.education. Developed as a companion practice to Day 8 of SLEEP: A 30-Day Tapping Intensive to Fall Asleep Faster and Wake Energised (Rebecca J Page, 2025).

content.text: A short affirmation for interrupting the mind's pull away from the present. "Enough" does specific work here: it names the present as complete in itself, not a waiting room for the next thing.

Say it slowly, three times. On each repetition, bring your awareness to one physical sensation, the weight of your body, your breath, the feel of the pillow. The statement and the sensation together anchor attention to the present. If the mind drifts back to its loop, say it again.
Original to homemade.education. Developed as a companion practice to Day 8 of SLEEP: A 30-Day Tapping Intensive to Fall Asleep Faster and Wake Energised (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
